channel.title: michelpereira/awesome-open-source-games Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: michelpereira/awesome-open-source-games Jun 8th, 2022
item.description:
Browser-Based

Arcade

  • ExecutiveManstars79 - Clone of NES game MegaMan, written in JavaScript.
  • Snakestars25 - Simple clone of the snake game, using canvas and JavaScript.

    • Browser-Based

    Strategy

  • Command & Conquerstars743 - Recreation of the original Command and Conquer, Real Time Strategy game entirely in HTML5 and JavaScript.

item.title: michelpereira/awesome-open-source-games May 18th, 2022
item.description:
Native

Strategy

  • Zero-Kstars532 - Open source RTS game with physical projectiles and smart units.
  • Stone Kingdoms - Real-time strategy based on the original Stronghold series.

item.title: michelpereira/awesome-open-source-games Mar 31st, 2022
item.description:
Browser-Based

Puzzle

  • 2048stars11.4k - Clone of 1024, based on Saming's 2048.
  • A Dark Roomstars42 - Dodge and shoot the red targets, grabbing the bombs as you go. Survive as long as possible and try to get a high score.

item.title: michelpereira/awesome-open-source-games Mar 29th, 2022
item.description:
Browser-Based

Arcade

  • Heal 'em Allstars48 - Explore old, abandoned graveyard, heal as many zombies as you can, and find your way out. But be careful not to become one of them.
  • Hyperspace Garbage Collectorstars59 - Guide N4n through the dangerous trash-heap caverns to reach the Primary Systems Core and restore compliance to the Trash.
  • Jekyll & Hyde Collidestars28 - Simple Unity 2d game that is very literally based around the theme of "change" using the classic Jeykll and Hyde story.
  • JumpSuitstars47 - With your awesome suit, jump from planet to planet to conquer them.
  • Mario 5 HTMLstars453 - Infinite Mario in HTML5 JavaScript using Canvas and Audio elements.
  • Mega Girlstars57 - The hyper-deluxed-super-mega software that beats back those malicious apps.
  • Monster Wants Candystars61 - Monster Wants Candy demo is a simple HTML5 game created with Phaser 2.0.7.
  • Octocat Jumpstars33 - Navigate your ever-jumping Octocat and collect stars for extra points.
  • Onslaught Arenastars183 - Fight off hordes of classic medieval monsters in this fast paced arcade shooter.
  • PolyBranchstars169 - Minimalist 3D game. Dodging branches may seem easy at first, let's see how long can you hold up as you approach terminal velocity.
  • Save The Foreststars12 - Fully canvas based HTML5 game where a player has to extinguish fire on tress using his magical water tank in order to save the Burning Forests.
  • Ski Freestars474 - Controls a skier on a mountain slope, avoiding obstacles while racing against time or performing stunts for points, depending on the game mode.
  • Space-Shooterstars11 - Classic shoot'em up space shooter build in HTML5 with multiplayer.
  • WPilotstars163 - Browser-based remake of the famous XPilot game, built with Node.js and HTML5.

    • Browser-Based

    RPG

  • Diablo JavaScriptstars898 - Isometric minimal-code style game at HTML5 canvas and JavaScript.
  • Room for Changestars133 - Randomly generated action RPG. You play as a chubby archeologist who is tasked to retrieve three sacred artifacts from the pyramid of the legendary Pharaohs.

    • Browser-Based

    Strategy

  • Ancient Beaststars1.2k - Materialize and control beasts in order to defeat your opponents.
  • Freeciv-webstars1.8k - Build cities, collect resources, organize your government, and build an army, with the ultimate goal of creating the best civilization.
  • Hexa Battlestars61 - Turn based dungeon crawler written with Typescript, using React and SVG.

    • Browser-Based

    Racing

  • HexGLstars1.4k - Futuristic HTML5 racing game, challenge your friends on this fast-paced 3D game.
  • Trigger Rally Online Editionstars266 - Fast arcade rally racing action, play in your browser with WebGL 3D graphics.

    • Browser-Based

    Sandbox

  • 3d.citystars1.4k - Goal was to build a city in 3D to test the performance of WebGL and and Three.js.
  • Blk Gamestars39 - Fully modifiable multiplayer voxel world in JS that can run efficiently in the browser.
  • Cube Enginestars154 - Resembles that of Minecraft, a popular voxel-type 3D game based on boxes.

    • Browser-Based

    Puzzle

  • Orbiumstars87 - Modern version of the 90's game Logical.

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Cocos2d for HTML5stars2.9k - Cocos2d for Web Browsers. Built using JavaScript.

item.title: michelpereira/awesome-open-source-games Feb 21st, 2022
item.description:
Native

FPS

  • Darkest Hourstars52 - World War 2 online multiplayer tactical shooter based on Red Orchestra: Ostfront.
  • Urban Terrorstars72 - Free multiplayer first person shooter that will run on any Quake III Arena compatible engine.

item.title: michelpereira/awesome-open-source-games Feb 20th, 2022
item.description:
Native

FPS

  • Red Eclipse - Fun-filled new take on the first person arena shooter, featuring parkour, impulse boosts, and more.

    • Native

    Platform

  • DDraceNetworkstars351 - Cooperative online precision platformer with thousands of maps and global ranks.

    • Browser-Based

    Arcade

  • Avabranchstars54 - Get your Ava away from the blocks moving between them.
  • Ball And Wallstars33 - Destroy the blocks using the Vaus, that is ejected from the ship.
  • Breakoutstars22 - Breakout multiplayer with HTML5. Destroy the blocks using one ball from your ship.
  • Jolly Jumperstars64 - Infinite jumping style game inspired by Doodle jump.
  • Core Commiterstars13 - Choose an open source project and help that project by sorting code to proper branches.
  • Diggerstars55 - The player is placed in an underground maze and can dig horizontal and vertical tunnels through it.
  • Drill Bunnystars41 - Drill game with a bunny finding good stuff under the earth.
  • Emberwindstars252 - Fantasy game port of the indie platform game Emberwind.
  • Alge's Escapadestars33 - Help Alge escape by moving through the levels to the escape tube.
  • Alien Invasionstars157 - Don't let the aliens reach the bottom, eliminate them using your spaceship.
  • Arashistars16 - Clone of the Arcade game Tempest. Survive as long as possible and score many points as possible.
  • Asteroidsstars307 - Pure JavaScript asteroids. Destroy asteroids ans saucers controlling a triangular ship rotating left and right.

    • Browser-Based

    Boardgame

  • 3D Hartwing Chess Setstars433 - 3D chess game done in HTML/CSS/JavaScript.
  • c4stars199 - Connect Four game where player is playing against an AI.
  • Lichessstars12.1k - Free chess game using HTML5 & websockets built with Scala, Play 2.8, MongoDB and Elasticsearch.

item.title: michelpereira/awesome-open-source-games Feb 9th, 2022
item.description:
Mobile Games

Android

  • Pimple Popperstars22 - Game to pop pimples using the awesome Godot Engine.

item.title: michelpereira/awesome-open-source-games Feb 6th, 2022
item.description:
Browser-Based

Puzzle

  • Pondstars54 - The Pound is about relaxing and exploring a beautiful world.

item.title: michelpereira/awesome-open-source-games Feb 5th, 2022
item.description:
Browser-Based

Arcade

  • Square Off!stars9 - Multiplayer 1v1 air-hockey style game, place squares to deflect the ball.

    • Browser-Based

    Puzzle

  • Swapstars159 - New take on the classic tile-based puzzle game, where you change which character you're controlling to reach your goal.

    • Native

    Action

  • OpenTombstars1.2k - Open-source Tomb Raider 1-5 engine remake.

    • Native

    MMORPG

  • Stendhalstars404 - Fun friendly and free 2D multiplayer online adventure game with an old school feel.

item.title: michelpereira/awesome-open-source-games Feb 4th, 2022
item.description:
Browser-Based

Boardgame

  • Green Mahjongstars77 - Solitaire mahjong game done in HTML/CSS/JavaScript.

    • Browser-Based

    Arcade

  • Captain Rogersstars44 - Captain Rogers: Asteroid Belt of Sirius - HTML5 mobile game created using ImpactJavaScript.
  • Clumsy Birdstars1.4k - Flappy Bird clone in JavaScript using MelonJavaScript.
  • DuckHunt JavaScript - DuckHunt ported to JavaScript and HTML5 with a level creator.
  • I Spy A Ghoststars49 - An experimental p2p multiplayer game made in HTML5/Phaser using WebRTC.
  • Space Crusadestars10 - HTML5 game developped with PhaserJavaScript Framework.

    • Browser-Based

    Puzzle

  • BitBotstars49 - HTML/JavaScript game where you control a bot, which must sense, plan, and act.
  • BlicblockJavaScriptstars14 - JavaScript game based on Blicblock in The Sims 4. Match tetrominoes to clear the board.
  • Sudoku JavaScriptstars14 - A Sudoku puzzle game with a clean design and mobile devices in mind.

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Babylon.js - Complete JavaScript framework for building 3D games with HTML 5 and WebGL.
  • CutJavaScriptstars2.2k - Lightweight and fast 2D HTML5 rendering engine for cross-platform game development.
  • EaselJavaScript - Library to make working with the Canvas element easier.
  • EntityJavaScriptstars185 - HTML5 JavaScript game engine utlizing the entity-component design.
  • GameJavaScriptstars459 - GameJs is a JavaScript library for writing 2D games or other interactive graphic applications for the HTML Canvas inspired by PyGame.
  • Kiwi.jsstars1.3k - Blazingly fast mobile & desktop browser based HTML5 game framework. It uses CocoonJavaScript for publishing to the AppStore.
  • LycheeJavaScript - Free HTML5 + native OpenGL Game Engine for Embedded, Console, Mobile, Server and Desktop.
  • MelonJavaScript - HTML5 game framework for 2D games.
  • PhysicsJavaScript - Modular, extendable, and easy-to-use physics engine for JavaScript.
  • Superpowers - TypeScript & ThreeJavaScript powered game engine and framework (2D & 3D with WebGL).

item.title: michelpereira/awesome-open-source-games Feb 3rd, 2022
item.description:
Browser-Based

Boardgame

  • Desperate Godsstars305 - Free online board game that was designed to be played just like a board game in real-life: no rules are enforced by the computer.

    • Browser-Based

    Arcade

  • CHANG€stars43 - Intense game about the extreme life of supermarket cashiers.
  • Coffee Snakestars30 - HTML5 snake game written in CoffeeScript.
  • Coilstars42 - HTML5 canvas game where you defeat enemies by wrapping enemies in your trail.
  • Color Queststars37 - Infinite runner following a black and white pixel's quest to change into a color pixel.
  • Custom Tetrisstars86 - Play the classic Tetris game the way you like it.
  • D3shooterstars14 - Asteroids style game in HTML5 as a demo of the d3 library.
  • Fluid Table Tennisstars70 - Renders a table tennis game interacting with a full-color real-time fluid simulation at 60 FPS.
  • HotFixstars202 - Help Hotfix collect stargazers and avoid enemies. Collect commits to upgrade hotfix and add new features.
  • Pappu Pakiastars435 - Addictive game where you guide little Pappu around obstacles while collecting coins, stars, and berries and avoiding enemies known as Pakias.
  • Snake_newstars36 - Classic nokia snake game using web.
  • Spashalstars7 - Danger lurks around every corner in space.
  • Super Mario Brosstars164 - Super Mario Bros level one written with Backbone Game Engine.
  • Survivorstars115 - Playable HTML + CSS + JavaScript remake of a space-based "shoot-'em-up" arcade game for Atari / Commodore 64 from 1982, including a level editor and design tool.

    • Browser-Based

    FPS

  • BananaBreadstars1.3k - Port of the Cube 2/Sauerbraten 3D game engine/first person shooter to the web, compiling C++ and OpenGL to JavaScript and WebGL using Emscripten.

    • Browser-Based

    MMORPG

  • BrowserQueststars9k - HTML5/JavaScript multiplayer game experiment.

    • Browser-Based

    Puzzle

  • Anagramicastars8 - A word game and API for anagrams.
  • Astrystars437 - WebGL maze game built with Three.js and Box2dWeb.
  • Beatrixstars15 - Music game where you arrange the drums to catch the beats and play the right rhythm.
  • Blockrain.jsstars916 - Embed & play the classic game on your site. Simple as that.
  • Branching Outstars66 - Minimalist game about leaving home.
  • Clone Manstars21 - Puzzle, memory, retro game with simple graphics.
  • Couch 2048stars25 - A physics-based puzzle, loosely related to the original 2048 game.
  • cube-composerstars1.9k - A puzzle game inspired by functional programming.
  • Drunken Vikingstars49 - Retrace your drunken rampage in reverse time.
  • Follow me! A Simon Clonestars6 - Fully commented version of the famous game in JavaScript, built using Phaser game engine.
  • For Kingstars31 - Puzzle platformer game about a king in search for his lost crown.
  • Hex 2048stars14 - Hexgrid-based clone of 2048.
  • Hexahedralstars20 - Push down all the blocks in the minimum number of moves.
  • Hextrisstars2k - Addictive puzzle game inspired by Tetris.
  • Infectorsstars11 - Sokoban-like puzzle game developed with Phaser.
  • Maze 3Dstars18 - A 3D maze game.
  • Monkey Rallystars21 - JavaScript game created for the Ludum Dare #28 jam.
  • Ned Et Les Maki - Puzzle game with isometric 3D graphics inspired by Sokoban.
  • Paritystars35 - A numbers puzzle game.
  • Pop Pop Winstars134 - Implementation of Minesweeper in Dart.
  • Push and Forkstars35 - Puzzle game in which you carry a fork, push blocks, and go back in time.
  • Shape Experimentstars5 - The shape recognition reflex game.
  • TransCubestars230 - 2d puzzle platformer based on the concept of transforming into different "blocks", with their unique properties, and making you way to the end of the level with the provided transformations.
  • Untrustedstars4.4k - Meta-JavaScript adventure game by Alex Nisnevich and Greg Shuflin.
  • Zokostars95 - 3D version of Sokoban.
  • Zopstars31 - Connect like colors.

    • Browser-Based

    Clicker

  • Particle Clickerstars559 - Addictive incremental game that teaches players the history of high energy particle physics.

    • Browser-Based

    Others

  • Binbstars273 - Competitive, multiplayer, realtime, guess the song game.
  • Dental Defender: Saga of the Candy Hordestars36 - HTML5 shooter/tower defense game for the #CandyJam.
  • Psiralstars63 - JavaScript/HTML5 game, GitHub Game Off 2 winner.
  • The Killerstars12 - Flash/ActionScript3-based "nongame".
  • Turkey Cooking Simulatorstars23 - You have been invited to craft the centerpiece of the American thanksgiving dinner, the turkey. Woo your girlfriend / boyfriend and be judged by your future in-laws! Apply your culinary expertise to impress your family.

    • Native

    FPS

  • OpenLarastars4k - Tomb Raider open-source engine.

    • Native

    MMORPG

  • Open Meridianstars127 - The first 3D MMORPG, released in 1996 and open sourced in 2012. Forked in 2013, Actively developed.
  • Meridian 59stars313 - The first 3D MMORPG, released in 1996 and open sourced in 2012. The original codebase for Meridian 59, less frequently updated.

    • Native

    Platform

  • Elemental Onestars36 - Built with the Phaser HTML5 game framework.

    • Native

    Puzzle/card/board

  • PokerTHstars412 - Implementation of Texas Hold'em supporting (online) multiplayer and botplay.

    • Native

    Strategy

  • Last Colonystars80 - RTS game with both a single player campaign mode as well as a multiplayer mode, created entirely in HTML5 and JavaScript.

    • Chat bots

  • c4botstars23 - Chat bot that plays Connect Four with you, works in web chat, Facebook Messenger, Skype, and Telegram.

    • Maps/Hacks/Plugins/Utilities/All of the Things™

  • FlxCollisionsstars2 - Simple set of 2d physics + collision demos for flixel v2.0.
  • JavaScript Breakoutsstars535 - Collection of JavaScript engine implementations of Breakout.

item.title: michelpereira/awesome-open-source-games Dec 26th, 2021
item.description:
Browser-Based

Point and Click

  • The Housestars139 - You're in a strange house. Can you find the way out? Is there any?

    • Native

    RPG

  • The Legend of Zelda: Mystery of Solarus DXstars170 - Sequel to The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past released on the SNES.
  • Angbandstars1.1k - Single-player dungeon exploration game in the universe of JRR Tolkien.
  • Arx Fatalisstars763 - Cross-platform port of Arx Fatalis, a first-person role-playing game.
  • Cataclysm: Dark Days Aheadstars7.6k - Roguelike set in a post-apocalyptic world.
  • Cendricstars255 - Platformer-RPG in a fantasy setting with puzzle elements.
  • Dungeon Crawl Stone Soupstars1.8k - Single-player roguelike dungeon exploration game with a larger focus on combat compared to other popular roguelikes.
  • Dungeon Monkey Eternalstars54 - Party-based fantasy roguelike role-playing game.
  • Egoboostars95 - Cool 3D dungeon crawling game in the spirit of NetHack.
  • Flare RPGstars53 - Fantasy action RPG game with its own engine.
  • Freeablostars2.1k - Open-source implementation of the Diablo I engine.
  • NetHackstars2.1k - Single-player roguelike dungeon exploration game and one of the most popular games in its genre.
  • OpenMWstars4.4k - Reimplementation of the Morrowind game engine.
  • Valyria Tearstars205 - Single-player medieval-fantasy 2D J-RPG.

    • Native

    Platform

  • HFT Mario Partystars54 - A remixed local multiplayer reimagining of the original Mario Bros.
  • Captain Holetoothstars57 - A fun, explorative and story-driven platformer with minigames. Made with the Godot Engine.
  • Commander Geniusstars168 - Commander Keen compatible clone.
  • Escape of the catstars7 - Hardcore oldschool platformer on INSTEADstars194.
  • Frogattostars527 - Action-adventure game, starring a certain quixotic frog.
  • Gishstars300 - Award-winning physics platformer.
  • Journey to the Center of Hawkthornestars1k - This 2d platformer is based on Community's Digital Estate Planning episodebuilt using the LÖVE game engine.
  • Mario-Level-1stars2k - First level of Super Mario Bros made with Python and Pygame.
  • Sky Enginestars13 - Custom engine 2D platform game made with OpenGL.
  • The Legend of Edgarstars93 - 2D platform game with a persistent world.
  • The Secret Chronicles of Dr. M.stars183 - A 2D platform game in classic style.
  • SuperTuxstars1.5k - Classic 2D jump'n'run sidescroller with Tux.

    • Native

    Puzzle/card/board

  • Castles of Dr. Creepstars23 - The Castles of Dr. Creep.
  • Nudokustars254 - Ncurses based CLI sudoku game.
  • PuzzleDashstars10 - Match-3 puzzle game.
  • Tictactoestars12 - Graphical tic-tac-toe AI which never loses.
  • 2048-clistars222 - CLI version of the game 2048 for your Linux terminal.
  • 2048-in-terminalstars122 - CLI version of the game 2048 made right.
  • Dominionstars63 - C# implementation of Dominion, a board/card game.
  • EbbeFlutstars3 - Really nice board game implemented in a bad way a VERY long time ago.
  • IRMINGARDstars5 - Patience card game written in Ruby.
  • Minilensstars125 - Cute puzzle platformer starring a cleaning robot on post-apocalyptic Earth.
  • Wizznicstars34 - Most awesome puzzle game.

    • Native

    Strategy

  • 0 A.D.stars2.2k - 3D RTS similar to Age of Empires II.
  • OpenFodderstars374 - Open-source implementation of Cannon Fodder.
  • OpenRAstars11.9k - Open-source implementation of the Red Alert engine using .NET/mono and OpenGL. Runs on Windows, Linux and macOS.
  • Caesariastars227 - Remake of the popular citybuilder and economic sim Caesar III.
  • Colobotstars938 - A real-time strategy game with programmable bots.
  • CorsixTHstars2.6k - Clone of Theme Hospital.
  • Curse of Warstars278 - Fast-paced action strategy game with ncurses and SDL frontends.
  • Harrisstars22 - Strategy game based around the actions of RAF Bomber Command in the Second World War.
  • Hedgewarsstars427 - A turn based strategy, artillery, action and comedy game.
  • KaM Remakestars317 - RTS game remake of “Knights and Merchants” written in Delphi from scratch.
  • KeeperRLstars696 - Roguelike dungeon builder inspired by Dwarf Fortress.
  • MegaGleststars303 - MegaGlest real-time strategy game engine (cross-platform, 3-d).
  • Micropolisstars747 - City-building game based on the original code for SimCity.
  • Openagestars11.3k - Clone of the Age of Empires II engine.
  • OpenDungeonsstars419 - Open source game inspired by Dungeon Keeper - Dark, damp and dangerous.
  • OpenTTDstars4.3k - OpenTTD is a transport simulation game based upon the popular game Transport Tycoon Deluxe, written by Chris Sawyer.
  • OpenXcomstars1.6k - Clone of the original X-COM.
  • Pax Britannicastars91 - Underwater one-button real-time strategy game.
  • PCOTM (Phone Case of the Monster)stars5 - Ruby game, where you play as a phone-collecting monster.
  • Pioneerstars1.2k - Game of lonely space adventure.
  • Polly-B-Gonestars60 - Physics platform game about a plucky wheeled robot named Polly.
  • OpenRCT2stars11k - Open source recreation of Rollercoaster Tycoon 2.
  • Race into Spacestars136 - Turn-based space race strategy game originally by Interplay.
  • Seven Kingdoms: Ancient Adversariesstars234 - Classic RTS game liberated in 2009.
  • Source of Talesstars59 - Entry in the Liberated Pixel Cup 2012.
  • Tanks of Freedomstars992 - Turn-based strategy game in isometric pixel-art style.
  • The Battle for Wesnothstars4.1k - Turn-based strategy game with a high fantasy theme.
  • Unknown Horizons - 2D isometric RTS economic strategy game written in C++ & Python, built on the Flexible Isometric Free Engine.
  • Voxeliqstars155 - Block-based game engine implementation developed with C#.
  • Wargusstars263 - Wargus is a Warcraft2 Mod that allows you to play Warcraft2 with the Stratagus engine.
  • Warzone 2100stars2.4k - Postnuclear realtime strategy.
  • Wyrmsunstars237 - Strategy game based on history, mythology and fiction.

    • Mobile Games

    Android

  • Game of Lifestars91 - Conway's Game of Life with editable rules.
  • ChaseWhisplyProjectstars525 - Chase Whisply is a FPS. You have to seek, find and kill the ghosts living around you.
  • Colorphunstars80 - ColorPhun is a simple color based Android Game.
  • Gidi Gamesstars66 - Lexis, TicTacToe, Puzzlemania - a collection of 3 board games done with Cocos2d for Android.
  • Green Wallstars22 - Weirdly addictive arcade-style android game, where you fling fruit at a wall. Project developed using Android Studio 1.0.
  • Memory Gamestars567 - Simple and beautiful memory game for kids.
  • Pixel Dungeonstars3.1k - Traditional roguelike game with pixel-art graphics and simple interface.
  • PuzzleGamestars57 - Slider puzzle game implementation created with Cocos2d for Android.
  • Wannabe Tempeststars19 - Clone of 80's coin-op arcade game Tempest(80's arcade game).

    • Mobile Games

    IOS

  • Gorillasstars250 - Iphone port of the popular old QBasic game.
  • Bat Loves Bugsstars10 - Arcade game about a bug-craving bat.
  • Bridgesstars173 - Puzzle game with bridges, houses, tolls, and subways for iOS.
  • Canabaltstars1.6k - Release of Canabalt for iOS.
  • Choose Figurestars38 - Simple logic game. Choose the right figure. Train your attention.
  • Doomstars733 - Doom Classic for iOS.
  • DrugsNRockstars14 - Simple multiplayer rhythm game designed during the 2013 Global Game Jam.
  • FinalFighterstars14 - Tank deathmatch battle game developed using Cocos2D.
  • Light Jockeystars17 - iOS Auditorium-like game.
  • Lumiostars174 - Puzzle game for iOS developed using Cocos2D. Available free on the App Store.
  • Sakura Flystars100 - iOS action game developed using SpriteKit. Available free on the App Store.
  • Wolfenstein 3Dstars477 - Wolfenstein 3D for iOS Source Release.

    • Frameworks/Engines/Libraries

  • Atomic Enginestars2.8k - Features 2D and 3D rendering, standards compliant JavaScript, full Player and Editor source on GitHub, Windows & Mac Editors, with deployment to Windows, Mac, WebGL, Android, and iOS from the editor.
  • ChoiceScriptstars378 - A language/engine for developing text-based multiple-choice interactive novels.
  • HaxeFlixelstars1.6k - Free, cross-platform 2D game engine powered by Haxe and OpenFL.
  • QICI Enginestars808 - Free JavaScript game engine library with a web-based comprehensive suite of toolset for making HTML5 games.
  • Quasi-Enginestars54 - QtQuick framework that intends to be a complete toolset to ease 2d game development.
  • Wurfel Enginestars94 - An isometric game engine for games with an open world made of blocks or voxels.
  • Cocos2d-xstars16.5k - Multi-platform framework for building 2d games, interactive books, demos and other graphical applications. It is based on cocos2d-iphone, but instead of using Objective-C, it uses C++. It works on iOS, Android, Windows Phone, macOS, Windows and Linux.
  • Starlingstars2.6k - ActionScript 3 library that mimics the conventional Flash display tree architecture, can be deployed to mobile devices (iOS, Android), the desktop (Windows, macOS), and to the browser (via the Flash plugin).
  • Akihabarastars193 - Set of libraries, tools and presets to create pixelated indie-style 8/16-bit era games in JavaScript.
  • Allegro 5stars1.5k - C++ libraries to make 2D games(graphics, sound, etc.).
  • Ammo.jsstars3.3k - Direct port of the Bullet Physics engine to JavaScript using Emscripten.
  • Bgfxstars12.2k - Cross-platform rendering library.
  • Chilli Worksstars152 - An open source, cross-platform game engine designed for indie developers.
  • Chipmunk Physicsstars1.8k - Simple, lightweight, fast and portable 2D rigid body physics library written in C.
  • Cocos2d for Androidstars609 - Cocos2d for Android, based on cocos2d-android-0.82, and now ported from cocos2d-iphone 0.99.4.
  • Cocos2d for iPhonestars4.1k - Framework for building 2D games, demos, and other graphical/interactive applications for iPod Touch, iPhone, iPad and Mac. It is based on the cocos2d design but instead of using python it, uses objective-C.
  • Craftystars3.2k - JavaScript game library that can help you create games in a structured way.
  • Dashstars415 - Free and open 3D game engine written in D.
  • Dualitystars1.3k - 2D Game Development Framework.
  • Evennia MUD/MU* Creation Systemstars1.5k - Library for creating online multiplayer text games (MUD, MUSH, MUX, MUCK, MOO etc) in pure Python.
  • Flarestars25 - Free/Libre Action Roleplaying Engine.
  • Flashpunkstars379 - Free ActionScript 3 library designed for developing 2D Flash games.
  • Flixelstars1.1k - Game-making library written entirely in ActionScript 3.
  • GamePlaystars3.8k - Cross-platform, C++ game framework/engine for creating 2D/3D mobile and desktop games.
  • GemRBstars751 - Cross-platform implementation of Bioware's Infinity Engine.
  • GenesisEnginestars41 - GenesisEngine allows you to create and explore procedurally-generated planetary systems, from ground level all the way out into space. Experiments with procedurally-generated worlds, XNA, and design patterns.
  • Gladiator 3Dstars25 - Canvas based JavaScript ray casting engine for pseudo 3D games.
  • Godotstars54.1k - Fully featured, MIT licensed, game engine. It focuses on having great tools, and a visual oriented workflow that can export to PC, Mobile and Web platforms with no hassle. The editor, language and APIs are feature rich, yet simple to learn, allowing you to become productive in a matter of hours.
  • JiGSstars41 - Online RPG and Trading Game Engine built in PHP.
  • JMonkeyEnginestars3.2k - Cutting edge, cross-platform 3D game engine for adventurous Java developers.
  • LibGDXstars20.6k - Desktop/Android/HTML5/iOS Java game development framework.
  • LibRocketstars1.1k - C++ user interface package based on the HTML and CSS standards. It is designed as a complete solution for any project's interface needs.
  • LibSDL2ppstars482 - C++11 bindings for SDL 2.0.
  • Matter.jsstars13.8k - Matter.js is a JavaScript 2D rigid body physics engine for the web.
  • MonoGamestars8.8k - XNA Implementation for Mono based platforms (supports iOS, Android, Linux, and started work on PS Suite and NaCli ).
  • Oimo.jsstars2.7k - Lightweight 3d physics engine for JavaScript.
  • OpenRTSstars1.1k - Real-Time Strategy game 3D engine coded in java 7.
  • Oxyginestars736 - C++ engine and framework for 2D games on iOS, Android, Windows, Linux and Mac.
  • panda.jsstars693 - Free HTML5 game engine for mobile and desktop with Canvas and WebGL rendering.
  • Phaserstars33k - Phaser is a fun, free and fast 2D game framework for making HTML5 games for desktop and mobile web browsers, supporting Canvas and WebGL rendering.
  • pixi.jsstars37.7k - Super fast HTML 5 2D rendering engine that uses webGL with canvas fallback.
  • Plasmastars173 - Cyan Worlds's Plasma game engine.
  • PlayCanvasstars7.8k - 3D WebGL game engine with online toolset.
  • Ren'pystars3.3k - A Visual Novel Engine, written in python, for both mobile (iOS beta) and desktop platforms.
  • SFMLstars8.1k - Simple and Fast Multimedia Library.
  • Solarusstars685 - An Action-RPG game engine written in C++.
  • Springstars2.8k - Real Time Strategy game engine.
  • Tesseractstars185 - Make mapping more fun by using modern dynamic rendering techniques, sothat you can get instant feedback on lighting changes, not just geometry.
  • Three.jsstars86k - JavaScript 3D library used in many browser games.
  • Tiledstars9.1k - Tiled is a general purpose tile map editor. It is meant to be used for editing maps of any tile-based game, be it an RPG, a platformer or a Breakout clone.
  • Torque 2Dstars612 - MIT Licensed version of Torque 2D from GarageGames.
  • Torque 3Dstars3.3k - MIT Licensed version of Torque 3D from GarageGames.
  • Turbulenz Enginestars3.9k - HTML5 game engine and server-side APIs available in JavaScript and TypeScript for building and distributing 2D and 3D games.
  • Urho3Dstars4.2k - Urho3D is a free lightweight, cross-platform 2D and 3D game engine implemented in C++ and released under the MIT license. Greatly inspired by OGRE and Horde3D.
  • XLEstars332 - Rendering engine with advanced features such as Image Based Lighting, dynamic area lights, and a node based material editor. Flexible and modular, it is designed to drop into existing solutions. XLE is the "hackable" engine, intended to be customised for specialised requirements.

    • Maps/Hacks/Plugins/Utilities/All of the Things™

  • Greenworksstars1.3k - A Node.js addon allowing you to integrate HTML5 game with Steamworks.
  • libfreenectstars3.3k - Drivers and libraries for the Xbox Kinect device on WIndows, Linux, and macOS.
  • OpenEmustars14.3k - Project to bring game emulation to macOS as a first class citizen.
  • Bfxrstars868 - Flash + AIR sound effects generator. Based on Sfxr.
  • Brood War APIstars1.5k - C++ framework to interact with the Real Time Strategy (RTS) game Starcraft: Broodwar.
  • Gamertagstars22 - Gem for retrieving Xbox Live Gamertag information from various sources.
  • Halo::Reach::APIstars15 - Ruby gem for interacting with the Halo:Reach API.
  • IodineGBAstars156 - GameBoy Advance emulator written entirely in JavaScript and powered by HTML5.
  • Itchstars1.9k - An electron cross-platform game downloader, installer, and library manager for itch.io written in TypeScript.
  • Leaderboard(Java)stars25 - Leaderboards backed by Redis(in Java).
  • Leaderboard(PHP)stars25 - Leaderboards backed by Redis(in PHP).
  • Leaderboard(Python)stars20 - Leaderboards backed by Redis(in Python).
  • Leaderboard(Ruby)stars476 - Leaderboards backed by Redis(in Ruby).
  • Leaderboard(Scala)stars9 - Leaderboards backed by Redis (in Scala).
  • Mudletstars565 - A cross-platform, open source, and super fast MUD (text-only MMORPGs) client with scripting in Lua.
  • Stats.jsstars7.9k - JavaScript performance monitor.
  • Tassadarstars44 - Starcraft 2 replay parser written in pure Ruby.
  • World of Warcraft Addons - Various World of Warcraft addons written in Lua.
  • World of Warcraft API Docsstars517 - Public documentation for the RESTful web service provided as part of the World of Warcraft community site.

    • Browser-Based

    Boardgame

  • Kriegspielstars19 - The game of imperfect information, the Kriegspiel chess variant.

    • Browser-Based

    Arcade

  • Ceros Snakestars5 - A remake of the iconic 70's Snake game.
  • Chromacorestars39 - 2D musical platformer set in a dark, black & white world that progressively becomes more colorful and happy through successful gameplay.
  • Crappy Birdstars45 - Flappy Bird clone in JavaScript and Canvas2D API.
  • Drakonasstars13 - Classic shoot 'em up game build with the Three.js library.
  • Masonry JavaScript Tetris Clonestars11 - Tetris clone created using HTML5/JavaScript/Phaser.
  • Phaser Snakestars4 - JavaScript version of the snake game, created using the Phaser Engine.
  • PixelPlatformerstars24 - Simple platformer game that demostrates the power of the Entity game engine.
  • Protocol 390stars20 - To survive in People's Park, you must supply the prophet with change.
  • Raging Gardensstars26 - JavaScript/HTML5 web browser game where a a hungry (ninja) rabbit farts too often.
  • Release Cyclesstars73 - Abstract racing game where you fight against the clock and the computer to get as far as you can in a product's life-cycle.
  • Zedinvadersstars7 - Game is based on our original comic ZED, seen inside "zero-episode" called "Game Over".

    • Browser-Based

    RPG

  • Roguishstars73 - RPG/Rogue-like game created in JavaScript.

    • Browser-Based

    Strategy

  • Tower Defensestars80 - 3D Tower Defense build with Three.js in HTML5.

    • Browser-Based

    Puzzle

  • Ending - Roguelike puzzle game.
  • Genetic Driftstars13 - Victor, an annoyed janitor dealing with a lot of annoyed clones and the problems that inevitably arise from genetic duplication. Will he make it home to feed his faithful pet companion?.
  • Lost! Beneath the Surfacestars6 - You're a firefly lost in the dark, beneath the surface and must find a way out of the mazes created by the horrors in the dark.
  • Prismstars24 - Match all the colors.
  • Sliding Puzzlestars22 - Sliding blocks puzzle game.
  • Matching Pairsstars18 - Made in HTML5 using Phaser as the framework, original assets and generated music.

    • Browser-Based

    Others

  • Beaststars30 - An homage to the 1984 ASCII game "BEAST" from Dan Baker, Alan Brown, Mark Hamilton and Derrick Shadel written in node. You have to squash little ASCII beasts between pushable blocks but watch you to not be eaten by them.
  • Descensus 2stars15 - A TypeScript 2D physics game.
  • Hauberkstars1.8k - Hauberk is a roguelike, an ASCII-art based procedurally-generated dungeon crawl game. It's written in Dart and runs in your browser.
  • HeartLinestars3 - Game made in 48 hours for the 2013 Global Game Jam.
  • CyberPongstars5 - Unusual Ping Pong game, adaptable with Makey Makey Kit.
  • Squirtsstars25 - Well-known indie game implemented in JavaScript.

    • Native

    Arcade

  • C-Dogs SDLstars665 - Overhead shoot-em-up port of the classic DOS game.
  • Chaos Projectilestars55 - 2D run'n'gun action game with RPG elements.
  • Clonepointstars61 - Libre clone of Gunpoint, a game in which you hack and punch your way to victory.
  • DynaDungeonsstars193 - Bomberman clone using the awesome open source Godot game engine.
  • Duckmarinesstars98 - A ChuChu Rocket remake for PC.
  • Epic Inventor - Indie, side-scrolling, action, RPG.
  • Falling Timestars22 - Arcade game inspired by Fall Down.
  • Kroniaxstars14 - Sidescrolling skill-based game.
  • Missile Commandstars14 - Missile Command clone in Lua with LÖVE.
  • Mystic Minestars68 - Single and multiplayer action game with mining carts.
  • OpenLieroXstars216 - Liero clone, like realtime Worms, or a 2D Quake.
  • OSGGstars9 - Oldskool Gravity Game, very difficult lander game in glorious vector graphics.
  • Savage Wheelsstars25 - 2D car crashing game similar to the old classic Destruction Derby.
  • Space Shooterstars486 - Cross platform, 2D space shooting game made using pygame.
  • SDL-Ballstars10 - Pretty looking breakout clone available in most distributions.
  • Taiseistars682 - Fan-made, open Source clone of the Touhou series.
  • Teeworldsstars2k - Online multi-player platform 2D shooter.
  • Wannabe Tempeststars13 - Tempest(80's arcade game) clone in Java, and a small project for playing with git.
  • Witch Blaststars190 - Roguelite dungeon crawl shooter similar to The Binding of Isaac.

    • Native

    FPS

  • AssaultCubestars645 - Total conversion of Wouter van Oortmerssen's FPS called Cube.
  • Freedoomstars751 - Free software FPS based on the classic Doom engine.
  • GlPortalstars332 - A modern 3D game and engine with portals written in C++.
  • Ioquake3stars2k - The free software FPS engine that can be used to play Quake 3, or make your own game.
  • Openspadesstars966 - Compatible client of Ace of Spades 0.75.
  • Unvanquishedstars790 - Fast-paced, futuristic FPS with RTS elements.
  • Warsow - Fast-paced FPS in a futuristic cartoonish world.

    • Native

    Racing

  • Stunt Rallystars428 - Rally game with Track Editor, based on VDrift and OGRE.
  • SuperTuxKartstars3.8k - Free 3D kart racing game featuring open source mascots.

    • Native

    Programming

  • CengBallstars28 - Soccer programming game with 2D simulation.

    • Native

    Sandbox

  • Blackvoxelstars90 - Sandbox game based on a molecular voxel interaction engine.
  • Craftstars9.4k - Simple Minecraft clone written in C using modern OpenGL.
  • Endless Skystars3.6k - Space trading and combat game similar to the classic Escape Velocity series.
  • Freeminerstars349 - Sandbox game inspired by Minecraft.
  • Minecraftstars4.9k - Simple Minecraft-inspired demo written in Python and Pyglet.
  • Manic Diggerstars261 - A multiplayer block-building voxel game, Minecraft clone.
  • Mineteststars8.1k - Infinite-world block sandbox game with survival and crafting.
  • Pycraftstars175 - A Minecraft-inspired game for the terminal.
  • Rigs of Rodsstars737 - Soft-Body physics simulator for vehicles and more.
  • Space Engineersstars2.9k - Space Engineers is a voxel-based sandbox game set in an asteroid field in space.
  • Terasologystars3.4k - Voxel world game engine inspired by Minecraft and others with fancy graphic effects and a heavy focus on extensibility.
  • The Powder Toystars3.5k - Falling-sand physics sandbox game.

    • Just The Source

  • Aquariastars247 - Breath-taking underwater fantasy game. Winner of the Grand Prize at the 2007 Independent Games Festival.
  • Doom 3stars4.3k - Doom 3 GPL source code release.
  • ID Software - Includes Doom, Quake, Wolfenstein and more.
  • Jedi Academystars348 - Jedi Academy source only, mirror of SourceForge from Raven Software.
  • Jedi Outcaststars222 - Jedi Outcast source only, mirror of SourceForge from Raven Software.
  • MaNGOSstars2.8k - Full featured World of Warcraft server.
  • Miner Wars 2081stars204 - For modders of Miner Wars 2081, a 6DOF action-survival space-shooter simulation-game set in the year 2081.
  • OpenJKstars1.7k - Community maintained fork of Jedi Academy and Jedi Outcast development.
  • Prince of Persiastars6.1k - Source code for the original Prince of Persia game that was written on the Apple II, in 6502 assembly language, between 1985-89.
  • UFO RUNstars63 - Real time multiplayer with Nextpeer.
  • System Shockstars1.4k - Source code for original System Shock game (PowerMac version), more readable fork available herestars30.
